en_title: 007 First Light, Hitman Developer IO Interactive Announces Layoffs After 'Relationship With an External Partner' on Fantasy Project Ends
cn_title: 《007 初露锋芒》与《杀手》开发商IO Interactive裁员，奇幻项目外部合作终止
subtitle: 奇幻项目突遭变故
opus_summary: IOI因奇幻项目外部合作终止宣布裁员，人数未公布，与《007 初露锋芒》成功无关。奇幻项目原由XBOX发行，而微软正计划XBOX品牌重置，预计将引发更多裁员。

paragraphs.en: 007 First Light and Hitman developer IO Interactive has announced layoffs after an unexpected setback revolving around its upcoming fantasy game , which was reportedly set to be published by Xbox.
paragraphs.cn: 《007 初露锋芒》与《杀手》开发商IO Interactive宣布裁员，原因与其即将推出的奇幻游戏项目遭遇意外挫折有关，据报道该游戏原计划由XBOX发行。

paragraphs.en: The Danish developer took to social media to confirm that a relationship with an "external partner" that was working on the studio's upcoming fantasy game had ended. As a result, IO Interactive is laying off an unconfirmed number of staff, but it insisted it remained committed to supporting those who are impacted.
paragraphs.cn: 这家丹麦开发商在社交媒体上证实，与一家负责其奇幻游戏项目的「外部合作伙伴」的合作关系已经终止。因此，IO Interactive将进行裁员，具体人数未公布，但公司坚称将全力支持受影响的员工。

paragraphs.en: It is believed that these layoffs are unrelated to the successful release of 007 First Light , which IOI celebrated in the same post.
paragraphs.cn: 据信此次裁员与《007 初露锋芒》的成功发售无关，IOI在同一篇帖文中也庆祝了该作的发售。

paragraphs.en: Although IO Interactive did not explicitly name the external partner, Project Fantasy was reportedly set to be published by Xbox. According to a leaked document from the FTC vs. Microsoft trial in 2023 , Microsoft had the game (then known as Project Dragon) listed as an exclusive for Xbox and PC. It also stated that the title would be published by Xbox Game Studios.
paragraphs.cn: 尽管IO Interactive未明确提及该外部合作伙伴的名称，但「Project Fantasy」据报道原计划由XBOX发行。根据2023年FTC诉微软案中泄露的文件，微软曾将该游戏（当时代号「Project Dragon」）列为XBOX与PC独占作品，并称该游戏将由XBOX Game Studios发行。

paragraphs.en: The IOI news also comes ahead what are expected to be significant restructuring at Xbox. Microsoft is planning a "reset" for the Xbox brand , which will reportedly include studio closures, game cancellations, and mass layoffs. Unionized Xbox employees are attempting to push back against the reset and cement protections for staff, but it remains to be seen what will happen.
paragraphs.cn: IOI裁员消息正值XBOX预计将进行重大重组之前。微软正计划对XBOX品牌进行「重置」，据报道将涉及工作室关闭、游戏取消和大量裁员。已成立工会的XBOX员工正试图抵制这次重置并强化员工保护，但最终结果如何还有待观察。

paragraphs.en: Cade Onder is a freelancer for IGN's news team. He covers all things entertainment, including gaming, film, and more. You can find him on Twitter @Cade_Onder.
paragraphs.cn: Cade Onder是IGN新闻团队的自由撰稿人。他报道各类娱乐内容，涵盖游戏、影视等领域。你可以在X @Cade_Onder上找到他。
